mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oauth_client_details (client_id, device_info, client_secret, scope, authorized_grant_types, web_server_redirect_uri, authorities, access_token_validity, refresh_token_validity, additional_information, autoapprove, created) VALUES (#{clientId}, #{clientName}, #{clientSecure}, 'read,write,trust', 'password,refresh_token', NULL, NULL, #{tokenValidate}, #{refreshTokenValidate}, NULL, 1, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE device_info = #{clientName}, access_token_validity = #{tokenValidate}, refresh_token_validity = #{refreshTokenValidate}, created = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET session_start = NOW(), session_active = NOW() WHERE username = #{username}
